site.title: Celestia Island
site.description: An independent open-source organization exploring the frontiers of systems engineering

group.toolsDesc: Allowing agents to engage with the real world

entelecheia.name: Entelecheia
entelecheia.description: A Rust-based multi-agent collaboration platform with an exec-only microkernel design. Agents interact through ES module imports in an IEPL TypeScript layer, keeping the LLM surface minimal and composable.

shittim.name: Shittim Chest
shittim.description: The interactive face of Entelecheia — a streaming chat interface to converse with AI agents, a control panel to configure systems and manage permissions, plus desktop and mobile apps. Everything the user sees and touches.

tairitsu.name: Tairitsu
tairitsu.description: Build complete web applications that target WASI — a single, portable runtime for both frontend and backend. Write your UI and server logic in Rust, compile to WASI components, and deploy to browser, server, or edge. One runtime, one language, one codebase.

hikari.name: Hikari
hikari.description: A UI component library purpose-built for WASI. Polished, ready-made components that run on the same WASI runtime as your backend — no wasm-bindgen, no JavaScript glue. Build interfaces once, render them anywhere.

aoba.name: Aoba
aoba.tagline: Multi-Protocol Debugging & Simulation for Modbus RTU
aoba.description: Inspect, test, and simulate Modbus industrial devices right from your terminal. Connect to real hardware, spin up virtual devices for testing, and bridge data between protocols — an indispensable companion for automation engineers on the factory floor and in CI pipelines.

kirino.name: Kirino
kirino.description: Customizable zero-trust authentication & RBAC framework in Rust. Supports ANSI INCITS 359-2004 role hierarchies, separation of duties, and temporal constraints.

ratatui-markdown.name: Ratatui Markdown
ratatui-markdown.tagline: Rich markdown and diagrams for terminal apps
ratatui-markdown.description: Markdown rendering, syntax highlighting, Mermaid diagrams, collapsible JSON/TOML trees, and a hybrid scroll system — all built on ratatui. Feature-gated for selective inclusion in any TUI application.

yuuka.name: Yuuka
yuuka.tagline: Define deeply nested types in one sweep
yuuka.description: A proc-macro library that generates complex, deeply nested structs and enums from a compact DSL. Inline types are automatically flattened, derived, and wired up with serde — write one macro invocation, get an entire type hierarchy.

ichika.name: Ichika
ichika.description: Declaratively define multi-stage processing pipelines from closures. The pipe! macro generates all thread wiring and channel plumbing automatically — supporting mixed sync/async steps, branching, retry policies, and graceful shutdown.

hifumi.name: Hifumi
hifumi.tagline: Version your structs, migrate your data
hifumi.description: A serialization library for migrating data between struct versions. Annotate your types with version attributes and migration rules — Hifumi auto-generates all older-version structs and From impls, plus a CLI to diff structs across git history.

noa.name: Noa
noa.description: A document generator for Rust crates that produces Markdown, static HTML sites, and AI-powered multi-language translations — all from your source code and doc comments.
